name: specularis-market-terminal-lite
description: AI US Equity Flow Terminal — Specularis Market Terminal Lite. Static HTML + Vercel serverless functions. No bundler required.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static dashboard — no build step required. Vercel deploys outputDirectory: . directly.')"

notes.architecture: Static HTML + vanilla JS + Vercel serverless API routes. No Vite/React build pipeline active.
notes.active_entry: index.html → styles.css, app.js, i18n.js, config.js, modules/specularis-terminal-lite.js
notes.inactive_src: src/ directory (App.jsx, main.jsx, index.css) is legacy/experimental — NOT loaded by index.html and NOT deployed as active UI. vite.config.js and tailwind.config.js are retained for reference only.
notes.vercel: vercel.json sets buildCommand to a no-op echo. outputDirectory is project root. api/*.js are Vercel serverless functions.
notes.new_modules: modules/ directory contains ES module browser scripts for Specularis Market Terminal Lite v1 features.
